title: China Logistics — Shanghai study-abroad operational checklist
html:
TL;DR

  • Jan 24, 2024 logistics todo for the Shanghai fall study abroad commitment — three months after the "China it is" decision moment.
  • Confirms program: CIEE Shanghai "China in Global Context" — links the official program URL.
  • Open action items: talk to family about total plan; finalize with OSU Go office; finalize with Ford Family Foundation; send the application-process money.
  • Pure operational doc — no journaling, no reflection.
  • Bridge artifact between the commit moment and the first day of Shanghai classes eight months later.

Notes

Short logistics note. Notable for naming the funding triangle: Ford Family Foundation (the scholarship body), OSU Go office (the institutional channel), and the family conversation (the relational channel). All three needed alignment for the China chapter to actually launch.

The "talk to family about total plan" todo is the precursor to the same dad discontentment pattern Yahir later names — same launch, same locked-out-parent dynamic. He probably did have the conversation, but the family as hidden runway dynamic doesn't fix on a single talk.

Connections

  • shanghai study abroad · china chapter — the destination chapter
  • ciee · osu · ford family foundation — the funding/institutional triangle
  • 2023 10 17 travel ideas 2032 — the commit moment this followed
  • 2024 09 11 thoughts and things 9112024 — the arrival follow-through
  • family as hidden runway — the recurring launch-conversation pattern

Privacy

  • No PII or secrets.
